postedRules: No weapons drawn in the central exchange
Companion care stalls require Compact or rescue-charter stamps
Portal engine access — Merchant Circle only

allowed: Registered Rift keys with provenance seals
forbidden: Sale of living companions as inventory SKUs
Forced bonds / restraint-field auctions of Riftborn
Meridian command-route sales without Circle audit

ethics.rescueVsTrafficking: Legitimate rescue shelters treat injuries and return freedom. Trafficking cages companions for buyers. The comic condemns trafficking; legal player marketplace cosmetics are not companion ownership.
ethics.playerFacing: Website + game economy: cosmetics and Credits — never sell story consent or living companions for SOL.

glossary.blurb: Untouchable until bid closes — may hide contraband.
Relocates the entire bazaar along old Rift routes.
Title of the First Rift architect — identity sealed.
